title: sorbus domestica var. boissieri
intro: Sorbus domestica var. boissieri, also known as the Turkish mountain ash, is a variety of the whitebeam tree, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Sorbus domestica var. boissieri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and even certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Sorbus domestica var. boissieri often take the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
